name: Molasses Refrigerator Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, ginger, cloves, allspice and nutmeg; set aside.
2. Cream together shortening and sugar in a mixing bowl until light and fluffy, using an electric mixer at medium speed. Add eggs and beat well. Blend in molasses and butter/sour milk. Add dry ingredients to the mixture all at once, stirring just enough to moisten. Stir in raisins.
3. Spoon batter into greased 3-inch muffin pan cups, filling each about half full.
4. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 20 minutes or until golden brown. Serve hot with butter and jam.
Note: Batter can be stored in refrigerator in covered container for up to 3 weeks.
